title: Steven D. Anderson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Steven D. Anderson''' is an artist. He has created the artwork for many ''[[Star Wars]]'' novel covers, games, posters, puzzles, and other promotions.

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Novel covers===
*''Star Wars: [[Cloak of Deception]]'' (2001)
*''Star Wars: [[The Approaching Storm]]'' (2002)
*[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' novelization]] (2002)
*[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (unabridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones'' unabridged audiobook]] (2002)
*''Star Wars: [[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' (2002)
*''Star Wars: [[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' (2002)
*''Star Wars: [[Shatterpoint (novel)|Shatterpoint]]'' (2003)
*''Star Wars: [[A Forest Apart]]'' (2003)
*''Star Wars: [[Tatooine Ghost]]'' (2003)
*''Star Wars: [[The Cestus Deception]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[The Hive]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[Jedi Trial]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[Survivor's Quest]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[Fool's Bargain]]'' (2004)
*''Star Wars: [[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' (2005)
*[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] (2005)
*[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith'' unabridged audiobook]] (2005)
*''Star Wars: [[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]] (2006)

===Comic covers===
*''[[The Clone Wars: Mouse Hunt]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars: Procedure]]''

{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Steven D. Anderson}}
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' (2002)
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' (2003)
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' (2004)
*''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' (2005)
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' (2006)
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' (2006)

===Game covers===
*''[[Star Wars Monopoly Original Trilogy Collection]]''
*''[[Star Wars Trivial Pursuit]]'' DVD Edition
